items.title: Wall Street Brunch: Megacaps And The Fed
Big Tech earnings, Fed meeting feature as markets end January with busiest week of Q1: What to watch

items.title: 35% of Warren Buffett's $309 Billion Berkshire Hathaway Portfolio Is Invested in These 5 Financial Stocks. Here's the Best of the Bunch for 2026.
items.description: All of these financial stocks should be great long-term picks, but one appears to be the best choice for 2026.

items.title: Wall Street Week Ahead
items.description: Big Tech earnings and the Fed rate decision lead a volatile week.

items.title: Is the AI Bubble About to Burst? Here's How to Profit Either Way
items.author: Adria Cimino
items.description: AI stocks have driven S&P 500 gains, but high valuations raise bubble concerns. While corporate earnings support AI demand, investors should diversify across sectors and consider AI companies with lower valuations or diversified revenue streams to profit regardless of market direction.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Cited as AI chip giant with strong recent earnings and climbing revenue, demonstrating solid demand for AI products.
Highlighted as attractive AI stock trading at reasonable 21x forward earnings with diversified revenue from advertising, not solely dependent on AI growth.
Recommended as AI-involved player with diversified revenue streams that doesn't depend solely on AI for growth.
